calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Pursuant To California Code Of Civil Procedure 1008(A) Of The Court'S January 13, 2014 Order Sustaining Defendant Sutton'S Demurrer To Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint Without Leave To Amend
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on Wednesday, March 19, 2014:
Ian A. Hansen, Esq. of Hooshmand Law Group [415.318.5709] for Plaintiff NOEL HALLET;
No other appearances.

The Court adopts the following tentative ruling which is unopposed: PLAINTIFFS NOEL HALLETT, ABBY COOLEY, TARA HITZEMAN and HOLLI HITZEMAN'S Motion For Reconsideration Pursuant To California Code Of Civil Procedure 1008(A) Of The Court'S January 13, 2014 Order Sustaining Defendant Sutton'S Demurrer To Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint Without Leave To Amend is GRANTED. The Court on its own motion reconsiders its January 13, 2014 Order sustaining demurrer without leave to amend. The Court now rules as follows - demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege causes of action not precluded by res judicata, i.e. not raised in small claims action. Sanders v. Walsh (2013) 219 Cal.App.4th 855. Plaintiff shall have 10 days to file amended complaint. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Pursuant To California Code Of Civil Procedure 1008(A) Of The Court'S January 13, 2014 Order Sustaining Defendant Sutton'S Demurrer To Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint Without Leave To Amend

Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk B.Paredes, Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peggy Chang, Esq. of Buresh Kaplan, (510-548-7474), for Christina Sutton, Defendant and moving party.
Mark Hoosmand, Esq. of Hoosmand Law Group, (415-318-5709), for Noel Hallett, Plaintiff and opposing party.
Reporter Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR#5229, (415-828-1919).

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SUTTON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISISON. Judge Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
